key_risks: Hot May NFP on June 5 spikes yields and hits long-duration growth/tech
AI/semis momentum reversal or profit-taking after sharp recent run
Gold sells off if dollar bounces or real yields rise on hawkish data
Oil spike from EIA/geopolitics lifts energy and pressures growth multiples

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum, AI capex acceleration, Q1 chip sales +25% QoQ; leading tech tape into payrolls week.
AI spending forecast +47% YoY 2026; persistent thematic momentum (+22% 30d).
Growth leadership with strong breadth in tech/comms; benefits if jobs report cools rates.
Hedge against hot CPI/PPI reacceleration, weakening dollar, sticky inflation expectations.
FY27 $1.5T defense budget tailwind; strong momentum with lower beta than pure tech.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward AI/semis momentum which has dominated tape, with gold hedge for sticky inflation prints and defense as quality momentum diversifier ahead of May payrolls on June 5.
rationale_summary: Momentum-led tech/AI overweight with gold inflation hedge and defense diversifier targeting one-week alpha vs SPY through the June 5 payrolls catalyst.
